generatedNote: Post–data-runtime migration snapshot. Regenerate when shared boundaries change. CI enforces critical items via npm run check:shared-portable.

domHeavyUiHomes.remainingSharedDom: Many packages/shared/src files still use window/document/localStorage; long-term eviction per docs/PORTABLE_SHARED.md.

surfacePolicy.portableLogic: Hooks, stores, backends, orchestration, domain logic, and helpers imported by more than one host app. Must be importable/executable in web/electron/mobile/vitest without browser globals.
surfacePolicy.platformUi: Web/Electron rendering components and DOM bindings that are not imported by mobile. Keep in platform UI folders.
forbiddenInPortableLogic: web-only UI deps (sonner, radix, react-dom, etc.)

classification.portableDataLayer: Backends created via createHavenDataRuntime(client); get*Backend() reads requireHavenDataRuntime().
classification.hostWiring: apps/web, apps/electron renderer, apps/mobile App.tsx, tooling/test-support/setup/supabaseLocal — initialize before shared trees render.
classification.ciGuardrail: npm run check:shared-portable — blocks @shared/lib/supabase, packages/shared/src/lib/supabase.ts, process.env SUPABASE_* in packages/shared/src.
